message:
feat(fnp-python): conformance_sinc.rs harness (4 tests, 48 cases)

Tests native sinc function against NumPy oracle:
- 40 cases including zero, integers, fractions, pi multiples
- linspace ranges for continuous coverage
- Special values: inf, -inf, nan
- Integer zeros: sinc(n) = 0 for nonzero integers
- Empty array edge case

sinc(x) = sin(pi*x) / (pi*x), sinc(0) = 1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
